name: dbt-pipeline-toolkit
description: End-to-end dbt pipeline automation for SQL Server. CSV to star schema with staging, dimensions, facts, tests, and validation. Supports local SQL Server, Azure SQL Database, and remote instances with 4 auth types.
author: Mihaly Kavasi

sql_server.description: SQL Server hostname (e.g., localhost, myserver.database.windows.net). Leave empty to use the runtime 'connect' tool instead.

sql_database.description: Default SQL Server database name. Leave empty to specify at runtime.

sql_user.description: SQL Server username (for 'sql' auth type). Leave empty for Windows Auth or Entra Interactive.

sql_password.description: SQL Server password (for 'sql' auth type). Stored in system keychain.

sql_encrypt.description: Encrypt connection: 'true' (required for Azure), 'false' (typical for local). Default: 'false'

azure_tenant_id.description: Azure Entra ID tenant ID (only for 'entra_sp' auth type)

azure_client_id.description: Azure Entra ID client/application ID (only for 'entra_sp' auth type)

azure_client_secret.description: Azure Entra ID client secret (only for 'entra_sp' auth type). Stored in system keychain.
